items.title: Markets Settle Mixed on Big Day for Data
items.description: A day of steady reporting on the labor market and goods-producers sent market indexes in different directions today.

items.title: Jamie Dimon's Grip On US Credit Card Dominance Grows As JPMorgan Wins Apple Card Business From Goldman Sachs
items.description: Apple has selected JPMorgan Chase to take over the Apple Card from Goldman Sachs in a deal that will shift more than $20 billion in card balances, bolster JPMorgan's credit card dominance, and mark another step in Goldman's retreat from consumer banking.

items.title: Solana Mobile to airdrop 30% of smartphone token supply
items.description: Solana Mobile's SKR token will launch on January 21. Almost one-third will be distributed via airdrop. Holders will be able to elect "Guardians" to curate offerings on the Seeker smartphone app store.

items.title: Chase to become new issuer of Apple Card
items.description: WILMINGTON, Del., January 07, 2026--Today, Apple and Chase announced that Chase will become the new issuer of Apple Card, with an expected transition in approximately 24 months.

items.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Slips Back Below 49K; Trump Takes On Defense Firms (Live Coverage)
items.description: The Dow Jones index dipped in mixed trade Wednesday after surprise jobs data. Bitcoin stock Strategy jumped.
